query:
-- Verificar distribuição de chrStatus por mês (usando updatedAt)
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(updatedAt, '%Y-%m') as mes,
  chrStatus,
  COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM properfyProperties
WHERE updatedAt >= '2026-01-01' AND updatedAt <= '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(updatedAt, '%Y-%m'), chrStatus
ORDER BY mes, quantidade DESC

SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(updatedAt, '%Y-%m') as mes,
  chrStatus,
  COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM properfyProperties
WHERE updatedAt >= '2026-01-01' AND updatedAt <= '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(updatedAt, '%Y-%m'), chrStatus
ORDER BY mes, quantidade DESC
